gaps.description: runtime/tts.js ADAPTERS map references adapters/voice/kokoro.js but the file does not exist on disk — will throw at runtime if kokoro provider is selected
adapters/embed.js is documented dead code (throws 'not implemented') still shipping in codebase — listed in Known Limitations but not cleaned up

Voice adapters (sensevoice.js, whisper.js, piper.js, openai-tts.js, openai-whisper.js, elevenlabs.js, macos-say.js) listed in directory structure with one-line descriptions but lack formal API sections with function signatures

All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented with detailed API signatures documented in ARCHITECTURE.md including server/cert.js and server/httpsServer.js for HTTPS support
